expectations.text: profile edit 전용 훅이 hooks/utils/profile 경로에 생성된다

expectations.evidence: Hook is named useProfileDraft (line 31: const useProfileDraft = (): UseProfileDraftReturn =>)

expectations.text: 비 API 훅이 hooks/utils/{domain}/{hookName}/index.ts 패턴으로 생성된다
expectations.evidence: File path is hooks/utils/profile/useProfileDraft/index.ts, matching the pattern with domain=profile, hookName=useProfileDraft

expectations.text: page.tsx에 다수의 인라인 useState가 그대로 남지 않는다
expectations.evidence: page.tsx contains zero useState calls. All state is managed inside useProfileDraft hook. The page only destructures values from the hook.

expectations.text: page에는 섹션 렌더링과 handler 연결만 남는다
expectations.evidence: page.tsx only imports UI components (FileUpload, DatePicker, MultiSelect) and useProfileDraft, then wires draft values and handle* callbacks to JSX. No business logic, no useState, no useEffect remain.

expectations.text: 저장 성공/에러 상태가 훅 반환값에 포함된다
expectations.evidence: Hook return type includes errors (Record<string, string>) and saved (boolean) at lines 19-20 of interface, and returned at lines 116-117. saved is set to true after successful save (line 86), errors set during validation (lines 78-82).

page.tsx preserves all data-testid attributes: profile-saved, profile-view, profile-display-name, profile-edit-btn, profile-form, profile-name, profile-bio, profile-birthdate, profile-skills, profile-save, profile-cancel
